---
title: "Cycle-touring: A vision of post-peak holidays?"
description: "Robin Lovelace (2010). Cycle-touring: A vision of post-peak holidays?."
date: "2010-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_cycletouring_2010"
citation-type: ""
citation-type-label: ""
venue: ""
doi: ""
publication-url: ""
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
---

**Type:** 
**Year:** 2010

[BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2010). Cycle-touring: A vision of post-peak holidays?.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@misc{lovelace_cycletouring_2010,
  title = {Cycle-Touring: A Vision of Post-Peak Holidays?},
  author = {Lovelace, Robin},
  year = {2010},
  copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
